title: Asian Kitchen
description: every country 5 foods (not all country's yet)
body:
Asian Kitchen – A Minecraft Culinary Expansion
Asian Kitchen is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of Asian-inspired foods to enhance your in-game culinary experience. This mod adds five unique food items from every Asian country, allowing players to discover and craft regional dishes using Minecraft’s survival and cooking mechanics.

Features:
Authentic Asian Dishes – Craft a selection of foods from different Asian countries, each with unique ingredients and recipes.

New Ingredients – Gather region-specific ingredients to prepare traditional meals.

Cooking Equipment – Utilize specialized tools and crafting methods inspired by Asian kitchens.

Expanded Food Variety – Enjoy an enriched food system that adds depth to survival gameplay.

This mod is designed for players who enjoy food-related gameplay enhancements and want to explore diverse culinary traditions in Minecraft. Experience the flavors of Asia as you expand your Minecraft world’s cuisine! (the country's so far are Turkiye and sri lanka each 5 dishes per country)
